通天一号：我通天，绝不立教；
通天二号：我通天，绝不成圣；
通天三号：我通天，绝不封神；
东王公：我要建立最强天庭；
赵公明：我要戳穿鸿钧阴谋；
穿越者们降临洪荒，必然自诩正义，以推翻鸿钧的统治为己任。
对此，鸿钧只能说：我真不是反派啊。
穿越者：我不听我不听，你个糟老头子坏得很！

ord_number":"1002196"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.3","serial_count":"435","tags":"玄幻脑洞,玄幻,系统,穿越,洪荒,反派,无女主,架空,东方玄幻,搞笑轻松,无脑爽,魂穿","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/e4fc030b5869f18c2dc6b4e797248a1a~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779307986&x-signature=pkMRKP%2Bi1Y01gts5aMU6ADuA6LE%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"518567063979479","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"2.5039375e+07"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603220413060BD73A5BDBDBCE681BCD"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读7小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":48,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":25039,"reply_count":1,"show_pv":40305},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7134609677962363684","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"整本书而言，鸿钧为最强者，前期出现较高境界（半步超脱）保证后期战力不至于崩塌。且融合多本小说情节，多个穿越者相互对抗打脸，但其中不乏有部分明悟到的人（帝俊，元始等），情节很有意思。并且很多作者的通病，如境界无线叠加，无限宇宙。但此书并没有如此，及时停止，还是人佩服的。
此书选材较为新奇，穿越者之间相互对抗，且为系统流提供了一个新的思路——系统从何而来？本书给出来自己的解释。希望以后可以看到一本书，最后的BOSS是系统的创造者，期待一波。
佳作，五星没的说。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1661155846,"group_id":"7047692776216988676","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"老书虫了，欢迎大家观看作品，给予您善意的评价。","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N8SQz4gZjhvREdMPxO7ohzk=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/5f90418450b1452b8201bb436fff1ce8~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776710561&x-signature=QuOMOageul1YPZXUiWY2Tn1QIVA%3D","user_id":"93177675544","user_name":"Peterd"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"93177675544","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author","intro":"{"title_name":"作家","title_id":"author"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7047692776216988676","book_info":{"abstract":"【搞笑+爽文+无女主】
